positive: A mystical, highly stylized forest creature, reminiscent of a playful woodland spirit, composed with a striking silhouette against a deep indigo twilight sky. The creature should feature glowing bioluminescent details (teals and emeralds) emanating from its fur and antlers, contrasting with earthy mahogany and moss green tones. Focus on clean, graphic lines, strong contrast, and dynamic, central composition suitable for a circular or square apparel print. Minimalist background elements that suggest fog and stylized flora. Style: Neo-Art Deco tattoo design meets stained glass etching, rendered in high-detail digital ink style. High contrast, vibrant, elegant.
negative: blurry, bad anatomy, poorly drawn, noise, grain, watermark, text, logo, artifact, disfigured, multiple limbs, extra fingers, low resolution, monochrome, ugly
